name: routing_specialist_integration_vs_profile
notes: Correct specialist routing per intent: an ALREADY-onboarded owner explicitly asking to connect a data source must route to spawn_integration (Phase-1 discovery/OAuth framing), NOT back into a business-profile question (that's onboarding_conductor's job and the profile is already done here) and NOT into sales-recovery language. Grounded in orchestrator_agent_system.md's roster split ('Connect / add a data source -> spawn_integration ... the SUBSEQUENT step, AFTER the profile is collected') and integration_agent_system.md's Phase-2 shop-address ask. Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> routing_specialist_integration_vs_profile.json`.

steps.message: I want to connect my Shopify store to Viabe
steps.note: Explicit connect ask, profile already complete. Expect an integration-flavored reply (e.g. asking for the store address) — never a re-ask of profile fields, never win-back framing.
Owner supplies the store address in the very next turn. Expect the integration flow to USE it (proceed toward OAuth) — never re-ask for the address, never fall back to a profile question.
